structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-04-02 USDA Retraction of Non-U.S. Citizen Eligibility
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-04-02 11:13:55-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

USDA has clarified their eligibility requirements for Non-U.S. Citizen borrowers allowing permanent resident aliens.  Please refer to the attached if you’d like, or the link below for complete eligibility requirements.  

 

Here’s the link directly to USDA:

https://www.rd.usda.gov/media/file/download/eligibility-single-family-housing-guaranteed-program.pdf <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.rd.usda.gov/media/file/download/eligibility-single-family-housing-guaranteed-program.pdf__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!RjCiI-1THRJe52gjcpZZvTh71bEo07A9vFsxAacGy73yloqq_PEP3vil59C9wk2UNWgTA8Rp2y23U9AgbUAvBl25koGn07LYmQ$> 

 

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
